cpt_bundles.rationale: Upper GI endoscopy with biopsy (43239) includes diagnostic upper GI endoscopy (43235).
Left heart catheterization includes right heart catheterization if performed together.

cms_lcd_ncd.rationale: Comprehensive metabolic panel must be linked to a covered medical necessity such as Diabetes or Hypertension.
MRI Brain without contrast requires prior authorization for non-emergency indications.

modifiers.25: Significant, separately identifiable evaluation and management service by the same physician on the same day of the procedure or other service.
